title: Quarter 3, 2021 – Employee and Team of the Quarter
summary: We are pleased to announce our award winners for Employees of the Quarter and Team of the Quarter for Quarter 3, July – September 2021! Employees of the Quarter Kendra Takak – Employment and Training Director Kendra has been an enthusiastic resource for me in my position at AMCC as the Education Coordinator. She carefully and patiently answers all my questions and provides answers to questions I don’t know to ask yet. I have wanted to bring cultural relevancy to the educational opportunities at AMCC and...
